title: Tragedy re-run: Returning from IPL match, 2 childhood friends die after car hits bike in Delhi
content: A somber incident unfolded in northeast Delhi when two young men, Rohit Kashyap (31) and Hemant Sharma (33), tragically lost their lives in a shocking hit-and-run following an IPL match.

title: Kiddnapped at knifepoint, 11-year-old gang-raped in Ayodhya
content: In Ayodhya, Uttar Pradesh, an 11-year-old girl was allegedly kidnapped and gang-raped during a village function. Police have detained two men in their mid-20s after the survivor recounted the harrowing ordeal. The incident occurred when the girl was taken at knife-point to a deserted location and later abandoned near a canal. Legal proceedings are ongoing.

title: Oracle layoffs: No Warn Act protections and other things employees are fighting for
content: Oracle's mass layoff of 20,000 employees via email on March 31, 2026, has sparked employee backlash over severance terms and WARN Act loopholes. Workers are contesting the company's offer of limited severance and the denial of accelerated stock vesting, with many feeling unfairly excluded from protections.

title: Tamil Nadu CM Vijay resigns from Trichy East, retains Perambur seat
content: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister and TVK chief Vijay has resigned from the Tiruchirappalli East assembly seat, opting to retain Perambur. Sworn in earlier, Vijay pledged to usher in an era of "real, secular and social justice." He emphasized his connection to ordinary people, promising only achievable goals and expressing confidence in collective strength to overcome challenges.

title: Hantavirus-hit cruise ship passengers start disembarking in Spain, to be checked for symptoms
content: Passengers from a quarantined cruise ship, the MV Hondius, began disembarking off Tenerife after a hantavirus outbreak linked to the Andes strain. Three deaths and five positive cases were reported, prompting an international evacuation and medical screening for over 140 individuals on board.

title: After 43 yrs, US family sells electrical firm for $1.7bn; gives 540 workers $240m
content: A US-based businessman, Graham Walker, gifted his 540 employees a staggering $240 million from the $1.7 billion sale of his family's company, Fibrebond Corp. This generous act, where workers received an average of $443,000, stemmed from a condition Walker imposed before the sale to power-management giant Eaton.

title: Happy Mother's day: Top 100 wishes, messages, images, GIFs and greetings card
content: This Mother's Day, move beyond generic greetings to honor the women who raised you with meaningful messages. The article offers categorized heartfelt, witty, and minimalist quotes, acknowledging the "mental load" and celebrating "mothers of choice."

title: '168 children that your boss killed ... ': Iran 'congratulates' White House press secretary over baby news
content: Iran congratulated White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt on her newborn daughter while referencing the deadly US-backed strikes on an Iranian school in Minab. The Iranian Embassy in Armenia urged Leavitt to "think of the mothers" of the 168 children killed in the attack, which occurred during Operation Epic Fury.

title: Accenture CEO says companies are investing in AI, but adoption challenges remain
content: Accenture CEO Julie Sweet highlights a growing gap in Corporate America's AI integration, noting increased investment but lagging operational adoption.  The company is restructuring its operating model and workforce strategy, even tying employee promotions to AI proficiency, to accelerate AI-driven transformation. This proactive approach mirrors past digital shifts but is being implemented at a faster pace.

title: Inside ‘mommy brain’: How pregnancy and childbirth rewire the maternal mind
content: Pregnancy and childbirth trigger significant physiological, psychological, and emotional transformations in women, often leading to "mommy brain" characterized by forgetfulness and mental fog. Scientific studies reveal neural recalibration, not decline, as the brain adapts to caregiving demands. This experience, while common, requires understanding and support for new mothers navigating identity shifts and cognitive loads.

title: 'Don’t begin by claiming govt is broke': Ex-CM Stalin's message to newly elected Vijay
content: Tamil Nadu's new Chief Minister Vijay claimed the previous government left a Rs 10 lakh crore debt and an empty treasury. However, former CM M.K. Stalin refuted this, stating the state's debt is within limits and urging Vijay not to start his tenure with such claims. Vijay vowed transparency and prioritizing public welfare.

title: ‘Fuel price hike inevitable’: State-run oil firms lose over Rs 1 lakh cr in 10 weeks
content: State-owned oil companies are facing over Rs 1 lakh crore in losses due to soaring global fuel prices, with daily under-recoveries reaching Rs 1,700 crore. Despite this, petrol and diesel prices remain unchanged, impacting the financial health of these crucial energy providers. A fuel price hike now appears inevitable, with the government facing a political decision on timing and extent.

title: Gujarat shocker: 30-year-old’s ‘surprise’ visit to pregnant wife ends in road tragedy
content: A 30-year-old man, Samir Panchal, tragically died when his car caught fire on the Delhi-Mumbai Expressway near Vadodara. He was en route to Bilimora to surprise his pregnant wife and bring her home. The vehicle reportedly first collided with a crash barrier before erupting in flames.

title: CBSE Class 12 results to be out soon: What students must know before scorecards
content: A “CBSE Class 12 Results 2026 Coming Soon” banner on DigiLocker has fuelled expectations that the Central Board of Secondary Education may announce Class 12 board results shortly. Students will be able to access provisional marksheets through official CBSE portals, DigiLocker and other digital platforms once the results are declared.

title: Student from Hyderabad dies of electrocution at IIT-Patna
content: A tragic accident on the IIT-Patna campus claimed the life of 21-year-old BTech student Sadasivuni Harshith Patnaik. While retrieving a cricket ball, he was electrocuted by a live electric pole. Harshith, a dual degree student at IIM Bombay, had returned to attend his batchmates' farewell. The institute expressed deep sorrow and is investigating the incident.

title: 'Going to entertain': Ashwin backs Sooryavanshi to become all-format superstar
content: Ravichandran Ashwin has lauded Rajasthan Royals' 15-year-old sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, calling him a "box-office player" with the potential to represent India in all three formats. Despite RR's loss, Sooryavanshi impressed with his fearless batting, scoring 440 runs at a strike rate of 236.56 this IPL season.

title: 'New era of real, secular, social justice starts now': TVK chief Vijay's first speech as Tamil Nadu CM
content: Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam chief C Joseph Vijay assumed office as Tamil Nadu Chief Minister, promising a new era of secular and social justice governance. He highlighted the inherited financial strain, pledging transparency, strict action against corruption and drug abuse, and prioritizing education, roads, and water facilities for the people.

title: ‘Khoon ka badla khoon’: Woman killed by husband, in-laws within 90 days of marriage
content: A 22-year-old woman's suspicious death in Greater Noida has led to an arrest. Monika Nagar, married for three months, allegedly died due to property disputes with her husband and in-laws. Her mother claims they attempted to burn her body and escape. Police are investigating, with the postmortem inconclusive.

title: 'Vile, brazen & mischievous': CJI Surya Kant slams casteist remarks attributed to him on social media
content: Chief Justice of India Surya Kant has vehemently denied a fabricated social media quote attributed to him, calling the act "vile, brazen and mischievous." The CJI stated that manufacturing and attributing such a quote to the highest judicial office is an act of dishonesty and social incitement.

title: 'Create your confidence': NBA legend Cousins tells India’s basketball dreamers
content: In an exclusive interview with TimesofIndia.com, NBA legend DeMarcus Cousins reflected on redefining the role of big men in basketball. Cousins discussed overcoming serious injuries, learning the harsh business side of the NBA, and drawing inspiration from Kobe Bryant. He also urged young Indian players to believe in themselves, saying confidence comes from “the work that you put in”.

title: Vice Admiral Sanjay Vatsayan appointed next chief of Western Naval Command
content: Vice Admiral Sanjay Vatsayan is set to command the Western Naval Command, a crucial role safeguarding India's western coast. With extensive experience on frontline warships and in strategic planning, Vatsayan's appointment marks a significant move for the Indian Navy.

title: Chaos in Australian cricket? 5 senior players say no to new contracts
content: Cricket Australia faces internal unrest following the failed BBL privatisation, impacting national contracts and player satisfaction. Senior players are reportedly hesitant to sign due to financial terms and a desire for overseas league flexibility, with concerns over pay disparity and lucrative international offers shifting priorities.

title: Sooryavanshi makes heartwarming Mother’s Day post: 'This one’s for you, maa'
content: Rajasthan Royals teenager Vaibhav Sooryavanshi went viral after posting “This one’s for you, maa” on Mother’s Day ahead of the IPL 2026 clash against Gujarat Titans. The 15-year-old then created history by becoming the fastest and youngest player to hit 100 T20 sixes. RR also promoted their “Pink Promise” campaign, supporting women-led rural development and solar electrification projects across Rajasthan.

title: 'Slits throat with cutter': Woman killed for refusing to be ‘second wife’
content: A 26-year-old man allegedly murdered a young woman in Mandideep after she refused to become his second wife. The accused, Manoj Ahirwar, was arrested within 24 hours following a manhunt. The victim's mother was also injured while attempting to intervene during the fatal attack.

title: From KA Sengottaiyan to S Keerthana - what Vijay's Tamil Nadu cabinet looks like
content: C Joseph Vijay has become the new Chief Minister of Tamil Nadu. He took the oath of office along with his cabinet members. This marks the formal assumption of power by the Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam party. The party achieved a significant electoral victory on May 4. This win ended the long-standing dominance of traditional Dravidian parties.

title: FPI May trade: Foreign portfolio investiors withdrew Rs 14,231 crore from Indian equities
content: Foreign portfolio investors have withdrawn over Rs 2 lakh crore from Indian equities in 2026, with May seeing further outflows of Rs 14,231 crore. Persistent global macroeconomic uncertainties, including inflation and interest rate concerns, are driving this trend, making developed market debt more attractive. Despite overall selling, some selective interest remains in specific sectors and growth-oriented mid and small-cap stocks.

title: Deepika delivers as India beat China to clinch Archery World Cup gold
content: India’s women’s recurve archery team won a dramatic gold medal at the Archery World Cup in Shanghai after defeating hosts China 5-4 in a shoot-off. Deepika Kumari, Ankita Bhakat and teenager Kumkum Mohod held their nerve after a tense final ended 4-4. India had earlier stunned South Korea in the semifinals, securing their first women’s recurve World Cup gold since 2021.

title: From Panchayat leader to senior minister: The political journey of KA Sengottaiyan
content: K.A. Sengottaiyan, a veteran politician with a five-decade career, has achieved a remarkable feat by becoming a 10-time legislator in Tamil Nadu. His journey began in grassroots politics in the 1970s, leading to significant roles, including School Education Minister. Following his expulsion from AIADMK, he joined the TVK party, further demonstrating his enduring political influence.

title: Himanta Biswa Sarma set to return as Assam CM on May 12; PM Modi, Amit Shah to attend ceremony
content: Himanta Biswa Sarma has been unanimously re-elected as the BJP legislature party leader in Assam for a second term. Central observers JP Nadda and Nayab Singh Saini oversaw the meeting. Sarma is set to take oath as Chief Minister on Tuesday, with Prime Minister Narendra Modi attending as chief guest. The BJP-led NDA secured a decisive victory, winning 102 seats.

title: Hardik Pandya: India's ‘Clutch God’ who disappears for Mumbai Indians
content: Hardik Pandya has excelled for India in crunch T20 situations since 2024 but struggled to replicate that impact for Mumbai Indians. His bowling economy and batting strike rate dip sharply for MI, especially in death overs. Questions resurfaced after MI’s record 103-run loss to CSK, where Hardik avoided bowling late despite having overs left, highlighting his contrasting performances for franchise and country.

title: 'Congress misleading people by supporting govt in TN': PM Modi addresses rally in B'luru
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi addressed a large gathering in Bengaluru, inaugurating and laying the foundation for projects worth Rs 9,500 crore. He highlighted recent electoral victories in Puducherry, Assam, and Bengal, alongside Gujarat's local election success, as historic milestones. The visit also includes dedicating Sindhu Hospital to the nation.

title: 'Will continue to work with Tamil Nadu government': PM Modi congratulates Vijay on forming govt
content: C. Joseph Vijay was sworn in as the new Chief Minister of Tamil Nadu on Sunday, marking a significant political shift. Prime Minister Narendra Modi congratulated Vijay and assured continued central government support for the state's welfare. Vijay's party, TVK, secured victory in the 2026 elections, ending the dominance of Dravidian parties.

title: TVK ends DMK-AIADMK era, actor-politician Vijay sworn in as Tamil Nadu chief minister
content: C Joseph Vijay was sworn in as Tamil Nadu Chief Minister after his party, TVK, emerged as the single largest in the assembly. Vijay secured the required majority with support from Viduthalai Chiruthaigal Katchi and Indian Union Muslim League, unseating traditional Dravidian parties. He will seek a vote of confidence by May 13.

title: ‘I am not an angel …’: What Tamil Nadu CM Vijay said in his 1st address
content: C Joseph Vijay has been sworn in as Tamil Nadu Chief Minister, promising immediate welfare measures like free electricity up to 200 units. He emphasized performance, transparency, and a singular center of power, vowing to tackle fiscal mismanagement and drug abuse. Vijay also highlighted education, transport, and women's safety as key priorities, marking a new era of social justice.

title: West Bengal CM Suvendu Adhikari picks ex-EC observer as his adviser
content: In a notable move, the Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari has welcomed the expertise of retired IAS officer Subrata Gupta as an adviser, shortly after Gupta wrapped up his role as a special observer for the recent assembly elections. Additionally, Shantanu Bala has been entrusted with the position of CM's private secretary.

title: CITU calls South Coast Railway zone a “betrayal” of Andhra Pradesh, flags revenue loss
content: The trade union has cited revenue diversion to Odisha’s East Coast Railway, vacant safety posts and the choice of Mudasarlova as zonal headquarters. The TDP and BJP have hailed the gazette notification

title: Vijay resigns from Tiruchi East Assembly seat
content: According to official communication, the resignation letter of Mr. Vijay was handed over by Sengottaiyan and Venkataramanan

title: Himanta elected NDA leader, to take oath as Assam CM on May 12
content: Himanta Biswa Sarma was elected the BJP Legislature Party leader; he will take oath as Chief Minister in the presence of PM Narendra Modi and other BJP leaders

title: Tamil Nadu government formation LIVE: C. Joseph Vijay resigns from Tiruchi East Assembly seat
content: Former T.N. Chief Minister Stalin reacts sharply to Mr. Vijay's remarks that DMK government had left State treasury empty with debt burden of ₹10 lakh crore

title: Inauguration of Dhyan Mandir at Art of Living: PM Modi stresses on mental wellbeing
content: The Prime Minister was inaugurating Dhyan Mandir in the Art of Living (AOL) International Centre premises to mark the 70th birthday of Sri Sri Ravishankar

title: Tension in Kadapa over Almaspet circle naming after Tipu Sultan or Hanuman
content: The Kadapa Collector and Superintendent of Police said the clashes at Almaspet junction were unfortunate. Cases have been registered, and arrests are likely

title: 200 units of free power, women safety force and anti-narcotics unit: Vijay’s top three priorities on Day 1 in office
content: Mr. Vijay signed the files soon after the swearing-in ceremony, in the presence of his fans and supporters gathered in Jawaharlal Nehru stadium in Chennai

title: FIR against Jaipur journalist for social media post targeting Rajasthan Chief Secretary
content: According to the FIR registered on May 8, the action was initiated following a Facebook post dated April 26 by freelance journalist Mahesh Jhalani, which allegedly contained objectionable content affecting the image of State Government and senior officials

title: Great Nicobar project will destroy unique ecosystem; pause, revisit venture: Ramesh to Environment Minister
content: Mr. Ramesh highlighted that security experts have written that the country's essential security needs can be met without inflicting such "ecological devastation"

title: Vande Mataram song during Vijay’s swearing-in ceremony: CPI questions relegation of Tamil Thaai Vaazhthu
content: Mr. Veerapandian said the Tamil invocation should be rendered first when newly-elected MLAs take oath, followed by the national anthem. “This practice should be followed in all government functions,” he added.

title: Three-hour meeting fails to end impasse over Congress Chief Minister for Kerala
content: Deepa Dasmunsi, party general secretary in charge of Kerala, told the media after the meeting that the high command had time until May 23 to finalise the candidate; senior leaders said party chief Mallikarjun Kharge and Lok Sabha LoP Rahul Gandhi were visibly dismayed by the poster wars and public marches

title: Prime Minister Narendra Modi attacks Congress on ‘betrayal of allies’
content: DMK was always working for the good of the Congress, and on several occasions, DMK has bailed Congress out of trouble,” the Prime Minister said

title: Artificial limbs, callipers distributed to 90 beneficiaries in Vijayawada
content: The artificial limbs and callipers, donated by the Sudeekshan Foundation, were distributed by Andhra Pradesh Mahila Commission chairperson Rayapati Sailaja at a programme

title: Driving change in an autorickshaw: This Bengaluru NGO is helping single mothers, abuse survivors rise from the ashes
content: Swavalambi Stree Auto-Rickshaw Driving Initiative by Bengaluru-based NGO Taliru Foundation has supported many women

title: Stalin reacts to Tamil Nadu CM Vijay speech: ‘Money is there; what is required is efficient administration’
content: Responding to Mr. Vijay’s claim that his electoral promises were practical, Mr. Stalin said the new Chief Minister had only just entered administration and would now learn the challenges involved in fulfilling promises.

title: Senthil Kumar, Laxmi Priya named CM Vijay’s Secretaries I and II
content: Senthil Kumar was a secretary of the Health and Famil Welfare department while Laxmi Priya was Secretary of the Adi Dravidar and Tribal Welfare department

title: Eluru pastor arrested under POCSO Act for sexual assault of minor
content: The accused, who ran a prayer house in Eluru district, was arrested on a charge of raping a minor and forcing her to abort the pregnancy

title: Fresh overhaul in Suvendu Adhikari administration likely in near future, say officials
content: The transition towards a more stable administrative structure would follow the Election Commission’s unprecedented scale of pre-poll reshuffle across the State bureaucracy and police establishment, officials said

title: Obituary | D. Sudhakar turned political adversities into advantages
content: Mr. Sudhakar, who used to maintain a low profile, was elected to the Karnataka Assembly for the first time from Challakere in 2004 on Congress ticket

title: Could hantavirus be the new emerging pathogen in Kerala?
content: Presence of antibodies against the virus in blood samples was reported in the State in 1999 itself and one probable case of the virus-induced ‘hemorrhagic fever with renal syndrome’ was reported in 2014. Experts say a good number of ‘leptospirosis-like’ illnesses, wherein patients die within four to five days could be due to hantavirus or a co-infection of leptospirosis and hanta. Symptoms are similar and hard to distinguish without targeted serology tests

title: What is the Governor’s role in a hung Assembly?
content: Why has Governor Rajendra Arlekar refused to swear in TVK party president Vijay as the new Chief Minister of Tamil Nadu? What is the primary objective of the Governor in such situations? What has the Supreme Court ruled in the past? Is the floor test the best way of proving majority?

title: Suvendu Adhikari | The Bengal pivot
content: Mamata Banerjee’s former trusted lieutenant has unseated her from power and become West Bengal’s first BJP Chief Minister

title: Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam | The star who stormed into politics
content: The political organisation built by actor-turned-politician Vijay, which emerged as the single largest party in the Assembly, declares itself as a secular movement, rooted in the Tamil experience, and committed to social justice and equality

title: One year after Operation Sindoor: The threat landscape has not disappeared
content: India’s long-term credibility, both domestically and internationally, will depend not merely on asserting the existence of cross-border terrorism

title: BJP won’t support any coalition formation in Tamil Nadu: Nainar Nagenthran
content: The BJP, as part of the AIADMK-led National Democratic Alliance, contested 27 seats. The party’s nominee M. Bhojarajan won by a slim margin of 976 votes

title: AAP holds protests against BJP over ED action against Punjab Minister Sanjeev Arora
content: The AAP leaders and volunteers burnt effigies of the BJP-led Centre and raised slogans against it. They were also carrying placards which read 'ED-BJP gathjod murdabad'

title: T.N. Government formation: IUML endorses M.K. Stalin’s demand for a new government
content: Professor Kader Mohideen, the leader of the party, said his party has not given a letter of support to Tamilaga Vetri Kazhagam, led by actor Vijay.

title: New generation, new voice, new imagination: Rahul, Kharge hail Vijay's swearing-in as T.N. CM
content: Mr. Vijay was sworn in as the Tamil Nadu Chief Minister on May 10, 2026 in a colourful ceremony attended by Congress leader Rahul Gandhi, ushering in the first non-DMK, non-AIADMK government in the southern State in 60 years

title: Five arrested for stealing power cables from residential layouts near Mysuru
content: Four bundles of ACSR wire weighing 281 kgs, one goods vehicle and cash amounting to ₹2.47 lakh were seized from the accused

title: PM Modi congratulates TVK chief Vijay on taking oath as Tamil Nadu CM
content: TVK chief and its Legislature Party Leader Vijay was sworn in as Tamil Nadu Chief Minister on May 10, 2026

title: Mythos | Double-edged sword
content: The Anthropic AI model can not only identify vulnerabilities in cyberspace that humans may have missed, but also generate ways to exploit them, potentially even for non-experts

title: Vijay, the second debutant Legislator, to be sworn in as T.N. CM since 1967
content: Mr. Vijay is also the first member of a minority religious denomination (Christian) to occupy the top post in the State

title: Second plea filed in Supreme Court challenging Governor's delay in inviting Vijay to form govt. in Tamil Nadu
content: The Governor’s refusal to invite Mr. Vijay, as the head of the single largest party to emerge after the 2026 Assembly election, is a hostile move against parliamentary democracy, the petition says

title: 126 MLAs-elect in T.N. have criminal cases pending against them; TVK tops list with 41
content: As many as 19 MLAs-elect from the TVK, 14 each from the AIADMK and the DMK, two each from the Congress and the PMK, and one each from the AMMK, the CPI, the DMDK, the IUML, and the VCK have declared that serious criminal cases were pending against them

title: Punjab Minister Sanjeev Arora sent to seven-day ED custody
content: Punjab's Industries Minister Sanjeev Arora was arrested on the evening of May 9, 2026, at his official residence in Chandigarh by the Enforcement Directorate in a GST fraud case following raids against him

title: NDA leaders meet Assam Governor at Lok Bhavan, stake claim to form government
content: It will be the third successive NDA Government in Assam, with the saffron party-led administration first assuming power in 2016, which was headed by Union minister Sarbananda Sonowal

title: CEC Gyanesh Kumar prays at Tirumala temple
content: The Chief Election Commissioner offered prayers during the Srivani darshan break, after a visit to the Goddess Padmavati Ammavaru temple at Tiruchanoor

title: 10-year-old boy dies in leopard attack in Nagamale in M.M. Hills
content: The family, which was on a visit to M.M. Hills Temple, was proceeding to Nagamale when the leopard is believed to have suddenly attacked the boy and dragged him away

title: Shashi Bhushan Kumar moves to Water Resources, Kantilal Dande gets FAC of Panchayat Raj
content: The Andhra Pradesh government has transferred Special Chief Secretary Shashi Bhushan Kumar to the Water Resources Department, relieving G. Sai Prasad of Full Additional Charge. Kantilal Dande has been given FAC of Panchayat Raj

title: Merger of Telangana intermediate education with school education put on hold
content: Admissions for intermediate colleges will continue as usual for the next academic year (2026-27) ending speculations

title: Regional, caste calculus in BJP’s West Bengal Cabinet choices
content: BJP gives Ministerial berths to representatives of the Matua, tribal, OBC, Rajbangshi, Brahmin, and Kayastha communities; there is one women in Suvendu Adhikari’s Council of Ministers

title: Massive response to The Hindu EducationPlus Career Counselling Fair-2026 in Bengaluru
content: Higher Education Minister M.C. Sudhakar suggested that career counselling could begin early, at grade 8

title: Vijay’s Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam: a new political dawn in Tamil Nadu
content: It is not charisma or cine appeal alone that has gone in favour of Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) and its founder C. Joseph Vijay in the 2026 Assembly election. For years now, several sections of the people had been tiring of the AIADMK and the DMK and wanted to move on. Pollsters were confounded by the havoc wreaked by the ‘Vijay tide’.

title: Masthan Rao Yadav seeks logistics corridor along Buckingham Canal in Andhra Pradesh
content: The Rajya Sabha MP wants a pilot project between Krishnapatnam and Ramayapatnam ports. Union Minister Sarbananda Sonowal has asked him to wait for the IWAI’s hydrographic survey on National Waterway-4

title: Pawan Kalyan secures return of Annamayya woman Shehnaz stranded in Muscat
content: Shehnaz, a native of Valmikipuram in Annamayya district, landed at Hyderabad airport on Friday after the Deputy Chief Minister’s intervention with the Ministry of External Affairs and the Indian Embassy in Oman

title: TVK-led Tamil Nadu Government | Full list of Ministers
content: Here’s a full list of Ministers being inducted into the TVK-led new Tamil Nadu Government, with C. Joseph Vijay at its helm

title: Joseph Vijay sworn-in as Tamil Nadu Chief Minister
content: As he commenced uttering “C. Joseph Vijay ennum naan…”, the crowd erupted in celebration, with whistle sounds filling the stadium with excitement and a sense of political arrival

title: Delhi on high alert over possible terror threat, security upped across key locations
content: According to sources, agencies have received alerts regarding possible attempts to target prominent offices and crowded areas in central Delhi using suicide attacks, vehicle-borne improvised explosive devices (IEDs), shootings and coordinated strikes

title: Muslim population in India may match that of Indonesia after Census: Kiren Rijiju
content: The Union Minister dismissed claims that minorities are under threat in the country, alleging that some political organisations are trying to create fear among the Muslims and Christians

title: Pawan Kalyan welcomes PM Modi on Telangana visit, thanks NDA government for ₹9,400-crore projects
content: The Andhra Pradesh Deputy Chief Minister and Jana Sena Party chief said the foundation-laying for projects worth ₹9,400 crore would strengthen infrastructure, connectivity and economic growth in Telangana

title: AP Waqf Board to conduct talent test for free intermediate education to 250 students
content: The Taleem-e-Hunar test, scheduled for May 17, will select students for free residential intermediate education with coaching for IIT-JEE, NEET and EAPCET. Girls have 33% reservation

title: EAM Jaishankar hands over India-assisted agro-processing facility in South Trinidad
content: S. Jaishankar arrived in Port of Spain from Paramaribo on May 8 on the concluding leg of his three-nation tour of Jamaica, Suriname, and Trinidad and Tobago, aimed at deepening India’s engagement with the Caribbean nations

title: Mizoram police bust racket using fake court papers to release prisoners
content: Two people, including an ambulance driver, were arrested for allegedly masterminding the operation to free 17 inmates from a district jail

title: Champaran challenger | Nishant Kumar begins political journey as JD(U) leader in Bihar
content: With the BJP installing its first Chief Minister in Bihar, the JD(U)’s previously reticent Nishant Kumar has taken on the political mantle from his father, Nitish Kumar, and accepted politics as a full-fledged profession for the survival of the party

title: News in Frames: A humble leaf that whispers home
content: A resilient food crop grown year-round across the Valley, the distinct Kashmiri collard green is more than just a vegetable; it is a cultural culinary experience that transcends social and economic boundaries

title: Party Leaders Turn Against Mamata Banerjee In Post-Poll Trinamool Meltdown
content: TMC spokesperson Riju Dutta, who often represented the party on debate panels, released a video on his X handle apologising to Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari.

title: US-Iran War News LIVE Updates: 9 Dead As Israel Strikes Lebanon Despite Truce
content: US-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: A US admiral said US forces sank six small Iranian ships. Iran denied any had been sunk and earlier fired warning shots at US warships

title: "Society More Powerful Than Government": PM Modi At Art Of Living Event
content: Addressing a large gathering at the event, the Prime Minister spoke about spirituality, public participation in nation-building, environmental protection and the role of youth in shaping a developed India.

title: "Full Faith": Punjab Minister Sanjeev Arora-Linked Firm Refutes Probe Agency Charges
content: The company said it entered the mobile phone export business in May 2023 in line with the Government of India's "Make in India" initiative and the Production Linked Incentive (PLI) scheme.

title: India's Rail Waitlist Crisis: Over 3 Crore People Missed Travel In 2025-26
content: RTI replies from the Railways reveal that 3.39 crore passengers could not travel in FY 2025-26 after their waitlisted tickets remained unconfirmed and were automatically cancelled

title: MK Stalin Jabs Vijay Over "Rs 10 Lakh Crore Debt" Claim After Oath Ceremony
content: MK Stalin defended the state's financial management by enumerating various expenditures by his government over five years.

title: Rahul Gandhi Wants KC Venugopal As Kerala Chief Minister, Meets Him Privately: Sources
content: Before Congress leaders officially met at party chief Mallikarjun Kharge's place in Delhi, Rahul Gandhi met KC Venugopal separately, sources said

title: A UPI Payment At Toll Plaza That May Lead Cops To Suvendu Adhikari Aide's Killers
content: Chandranath Rath, a close aide of West Bengal's new Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari, was shot dead on a busy road on Wednesday.

title: Punjab Minister Sanjeev Arora Gets 7-Day Probe Agency Custody In Money Laundering Case
content: Sanjeev Arora was produced before the court at around 11:20 pm on Friday night. While the ED had sought 10 days' custodial interrogation, the court granted seven days of ED custody.

title: From Tiger State To Wildlife State, How Madhya Pradesh Is Rewriting India's Conservation Map
content: While the state is known as India’s “Tiger State,” it is now focusing on protecting many other animals too, including cheetahs, wild buffaloes, crocodiles and turtles

title: Vijay Makes 'Only 1 Power' Pitch In Tamil Nadu, Thanks DMK Allies For Support
content: In his first address as the Chief Minister, Vijay said, "There will be no power centre other than me. I will be the only centre of power" - asserting control over his decision-making.

title: Hantavirus-stricken Cruise Ship Arrives At Tenerife In Spain's Canary Islands
content: Everyone disembarking will be checked for symptoms, and will only be taken off the ship once evacuation flights are ready to fly them to their destinations.

title: Himanta Sarma To Take Oath For 2nd Term As Assam Chief Minister On May 12
content: Himanta Biswa Sarma will take the oath as the Chief Minister on May 12, along with members of his new Council of Ministers.

title: "We Just Hit Somebody": Pilots' Audio Surfaces After Person Killed On US Runway
content: Denver International Airport said the unidentified person had entered the airport area by jumping over a security fence.

title: "Parasite, Backstabber": PM Modi Tears Into Congress For Ditching DMK
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi attacked the "backstabber" Congress party which is an ally of Vijay's Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK), with an acerbic swipe over abandoning its longtime friend, DMK

title: At Vijay's Oath, Vande Mataram Plays In Full Followed By Jana Gana Mana
content: At Vijay's oath ceremony, 'Vande Mataram' was sung in full, followed by the national anthem 'Jana Gana Mana' and the state song 'Tamil Thai Vazhthu'.

title: Supriya Sule Safe After Car Hits Her Vehicle On Mumbai-Pune Expressway
content: "While travelling from Pune to Mumbai today I had an awful experience on the highway when vehicle GJ13CF5257 rammed into my car from the side due to reckless driving," she wrote on X.
